feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP build action - 403 error for POST API call with CSRF enabled
entry.content:
I'm trying to upload attachment in SAP using API with SAP build process automation and action.

API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV is the standard API used to upload attachment for WO. I tried to configure it in Actions but it result in 403 error for POST api call with CSRF enabled. So I tried to get token with GET call first and then used the same token in POST call as static value which works fine as well.

I'm not sure why POST api call throw 403 error with CSRF enabled...

entry.title: iOS builidng error
entry.content:
Hi to everyone

I have this error constantly when trying to build an iOS version. At android version I hadn`t any problem…

I believe that now my certificates are okay,
but please I accept any kind of help because as it is, it is impossible to locate the problem.

Thank you very much!

 

Runtime version: 4.9.218;
AB version: 2.1.14
COMMAND:

npxrnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.218 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-72867\""

FAILED with ERROR:

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p ios -s standalone_appstore -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.218 -r --xcodebuildArchiveArgs "OTHER_CODE_SIGN_FLAGS=\"--keychain\ AppGyver-72867\""

entry.title: SAP Build Process Automation Error:
entry.content:
Hi All,

I was trying to print the failed element name error in excel 

 

I have used "error.message" for getting the error but instead i am getting the following error:

can someone guide me on this?

@Chaitanya_Priya 

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: SAP BUILD Process Deploy Error
entry.content:
Hi All,

When I am deploying the process I am getting form error issue. So I tried to deploy the process one by one after adding each form but sometime it is getting deployed and sometime giving the same error:-

 Please someone guide on this.

entry.title: SAP Build Process automation -how to upload WO attachment from Build process automation to S4 system
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm trying to automate the upload WO attachment but couldn't find solution for it.

I tried automating SAP GUI but it didn't worked in VM-background. It need the VM to be login and focused to run the automation without error.

I tried API, API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV using action but it create new file instead of uploading existing file.

Any help is much appreciated...

 

SAP GUI screenshot:

Action screenshot:

entry.title: Accessing Cloud Foundry approuter from SAP Build Apps.
entry.content:
I have deployed a python app to BTP which is called via an app router setup using the following blog:

Create an Application with Cloud Foundry Python Buildpack | SAP Tutorials

 This uses an xsuaa service for authentication.

 

My next step is to use the above app as a service in a SAP BUILD Apps application via a BTP DESTINATION, but I am struggling to get a working example of how exactly to set up the destination.

Do I point it to the approuter with the service key generated in the xsuaa service binding?

What is the authentication method?

entry.title: Sap Build Andriod app displays black screen after logging in
entry.content:
Hello Sap Builders,

I am trying to build a sample android app using my trail account to fetch products from Northwind. I configured all the required configurations following this link. I am able to view the data while previewing the data in Lunch application. However, when I build the apk package and installed it on android mobile, I got a build login screen and when I entered username and password, the screens go on loading forever without any log messages and after sometime, the app crashes saying that is "not responding". I tried building the app several times and every time getting stuck at the same screen. Can you help me if I am missing anything here?

In brief, below activities are performed.

1. Ran booster to create build apps, custom identity provider and other required subscriptions
2. Created destination for Northwind in btp cockpit
3. Enabled the btp destination in build app and used the odata in UI canvas.
4. Preview app is successful
5. Create java keystore file in business application studio and used in build.
6. Enabled mobile services for the app and build the android app.
7. Installed the apk file and authenticated using build custom idp credentials/
8. After authentication, the screen goes black and eventually, "app not responding" with options either to wait or close the app.

 

SAP Build SAP Build Code

entry.title: SAP Build FTP Get File Collection Issue
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm encountering an issue in SAP Build when attempting to retrieve a File Collection from SFTP (Port 22). Although the connection appears to be stable and the folder path is valid, when utilizing the Get File Collection for FTP function, it returns 0 lists and 0 elements, despite the presence of multiple files within the folder.

entry.title: Redirecting to Build Apps when trying to open SAP BAS application from BTP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Good Day!

I created a BTP Trail account and had the detailed set up of a trail sub-account subscribed to SAP Business Application Studio and SAP Build Apps(Used Boosters to get the complete set up). You can see my subscription details in below screenshot.

I've done this set up a month back and continuously using the same.

My actual Question is When I'm trying to log into the SAP Business Application Studio it is redirecting me to SAP Build Page.

When I'm clicking on the "SAP Business Application Studio" from the screen shown in above screenshot, it is first loading the BAS, but in few seconds it is taking me to SAP Build page like in the below screenshots.

Screenshot - 1 - First Loading the BAS developer space.

Screenshot - 2 - immediately, in few seconds it is redirecting to the below page(SAP Build)

 

Note : I've not done any config changes to my BTP sub-account. I'm facing this issue from yesterday(6-5-2024). Till yesterday, the BAS was working perfectly fine.

When opened the console while opening the BAS, I got the below log

Kindly help me out to figure out this issue or guide me through if there's anything that I've missed. Thanks in advance!

Thanks,

Boopalan M

entry.title: Not able to do build apps its says FAILED with ERROR:
entry.content:
Runtime version: 4.9.260;
AB version: 2.3.0
COMMAND:

NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16000 npxrnv export -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.260 -r

FAILED with ERROR:

Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.260 -r

SAP Build Apps SAP Build

entry.title: CSRF token issue with Rest API type of system integration in SAP build apps
entry.content:
Hello,

We have created a backend destination in subaccount and tried creating a 'SAP BTP Destination REST API integration' type data entity.

We select the BTP destination created in subaccount and configure the list(GET call) to the required entity. we are adding additional inputs for filters.

and passing filter value dynamically from JS file as below in get record collection.(formula : "?$filter="+outputs["JSFile"].result)

This is working perfectly fine in local app preview from build apps. But when i deploy the app to launchpad and expose the app as tile and open it through launchpad i get CSRF token error as below.

Are we missing any configuration? Please help us with any idea/ suggestions.

Thank you,

Navya

entry.title: Getting Internal server error after deploying application in cloud foundry
entry.content: I'm getting a "internal server error" after successfully deploying a sap build app in cloud foundry via btp. After deployment, when I try to open the application from the url that I get from deploying, I get this problem.

entry.title: Problem with SAP Build Process Automation(Trial instance)
entry.content:
Hi community,

Since last 2-3 days, SAP build Process Automation trial tenant is not working. The same process(with Action calls) was working before and now it is throwing some random errors.

Moreover since yesterday, I am not able to deploy SBPA related any content(process, actions).. it always timed out. 

Tried creating a new trial, switching machines, clearing cache, different browsers but still the same since yesterday.

 

Please help @Archana 

 

Regards,

Aman

entry.title: Problem -Unable to call protected app from another App.
entry.content:
Hi Expert,
I have created two CAP applications, each with its own XSUAA authentication service. I want to call one CAP service from another CAP application. I followed @CarlosRoggan  blog here, which worked perfectly for external users but failed for the application-to-application case.

I followed the exact steps, but the user JWT token doesn't contain the provider app scope when doing it for another application. However, it works perfectly for external users. Please help me.
@CarlosRoggan @gregorw @MioYasutake @Ivan-Mirisola 

Thanks
Somnath

entry.title: Send files along with SAP Build Process Automation API Trigger
entry.content:
Hi All,

I just want to know is there a way to send PDF/Excel files along with the SAP Build Process Automation API Trigger ? So that I can extract the information from that file and do rest of the processing. Please point out to some blogs or documentations

Thank You

entry.title: Re: SAP build Process Automation is not capturing SAP GUI...
entry.content:
I am also trying to capture the below SAP GUI screen.

  

After screen capture it is not showing full parts of the screen. Because of it not able to access User Input field and Password Input field.

Please suggest how to resolve this issue.

Thanks,

Siddhant

entry.title: Old Instances Persisting in SAP Build Process Visibility Scenario After Redeployment
entry.content:
Hello,

Recently, I encountered a backend issue in my workflow within SAP Build Process Automation, which caused many instances to crash. After resolving the problem and redeploying the process, the old instances are still visible in the process visibility scenario, rendering it ineffective.

I've tried several solutions, including:

  • Deleting all "older" released versions of the process
  • Redeploying the process visibility scenario
  • Clearing the processed data in the monitoring settings of the SAP Build lobby

Despite these efforts, the old instances always reappear after processing new data. They are no longer visible in the monitoring of the process/workflow itself, yet they persist in the visibility scenario.

Does anyone have any hints on how to fix this?

Thank you!

entry.title: Cannot posting purchase order using ODATA API on SAP Build Action Editor
entry.content:
I'm trying to posting purchase order(Product Type：SERV) on SAP Build Action Editor but I cannnot posting it because of error(Error is pasted below) .

I think this error is caused  key is insufficient. So I wanna know what key is needed to posting purchase order(Product Type：SERV)  .

error：

request：

used action:

entry.title: "Document is not electronic; electronic data cannot be entered."
entry.content:
Hello,

I've referred to the video in the following URL "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j-2x-2Y7GGk" and deployed the Supplier Invoice Upload for Intelligent Invoice Scanning Bot (2R1) Template App. The trigger too ran successfully. Everything looked good on the BPA end, but when the process entered the Business One Phase of the process is when I have started facing a serious issue which is not letting me to complete the process.

 

Here are the details step wise.

1. I've opened the Electronic Document Import Wizard and located my invoice as I've selected the checkbox Determined and I have seen a message that stated the "Import file has been successfully determined".

2. I've clicked the drop down on the selected invoice and was able to see the invoice items successfully without any issues.

3. As suggested in the video, I have selected the option to generate all the rows and clicked next.

4. Then I have entered the summary report window that had my draft report and as I clicked on t, I was able to see the A/P Invoice - Draft. But when I have tried to save it, I got an error message which really is out of my understanding. Here's the message "Document is not electronic; electronic data cannot be entered."

I've searched online to see if anyone has ever faced such an issue, but I couldn't find any leads, so decided to post it here for expert advice.

Can anyone please take a look at this and explain where things are falling out of place.

I've attached two images to explain what I'm exactly seeing on my screen. 

 

Thanks in advance,

Gautham

entry.title: "Uncaught TypeError" during "EnrichFinance" Step in "Business Partner Creation Approval Process"
entry.content:
We have imported and testing "Business Partner Creation Approval Process" live process project from SAP Build Process Automation Store.

We are able to reach until "EnrichFinance" step without any issues.

But on "EnrichFinance" step, when we're trying to add Bank or Tax Data in My Inbox task, nothing happens.

There are no calls being made to any URL.

But in Console, we see errors when we are clicking on "+" button

For Bank Data -

For Tax Data -

Upon navigation to the referenced Component-preload.js, we see below line of code in failed state -

onAddTaxNumber: function() {
                        var e = this.getParentModel().getProperty("/BPRequest/FinanceData/TaxData");
                        e.push({
                            TaxCategory: "",
                            TaxNumber: ""
                        });
                        this.getParentModel().setProperty("/BPRequest/FinanceData/TaxData", e);
                        this.getParentModel().refresh()
                    },

Trigger to the process -

We are triggering process via API. Below is our payload -

{
  "RequestId": "1718213572",
  "BPRequest": {
    "BusinessPartnerCategory": "2",
    "BusinessPartnerName": "Bhupesh LLC",
    "RolesData": [
      {
        "BusinessPartnerRole": "Z001"
      }
    ],
    "AddressData": {
      "Country": "IN",
      "PostalCode": "400101",
      "CityName": "Mumbai"
    }
  },
  "RequesterDetails": {
    "RequesterUserId": "P000001",
    "RequesterFirstName": "Bhupesh",
    "RequesterLastName": "Yadav",
    "RequesterEmail": "<hidden>"
  },
  "internal": {
    "isRework": false
  }
}

 Please let us know if we are missing anything.
